import os
import radarsimpy as rs
license_file = str(os.environ.get('RADARSIMPY_LICENSE_FILE', '')).strip()
if license_file != '' and hasattr(rs, 'set_license'):
    rs.set_license(license_file)
is_licensed = bool(rs.is_licensed()) if hasattr(rs, 'is_licensed') else False
license_info = rs.get_license_info() if hasattr(rs, 'get_license_info') else ''
print(is_licensed)
print(license_info)
